name: @freik/media-utils
description: Utilities for dealing with media files in NodeJS/Electron
author: Kevin Frei (kevinfrei@hotmail.com)

scripts.buildesm: bun build --entrypoints src/index.ts --minify --external '@freik/*' --external music-metadata --target node --outdir ./lib/esm --format esm
scripts.buildcjs: bun build --entrypoints src/index.ts --minify --external '@freik/*' --external music-metadata --target node --outdir ./lib/cjs --format cjs
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run buildesm && bun run buildcjs && bun run buildtypes
scripts.dbgbuild: bun run clean && tools make-module --platform node --map src/*.ts
scripts.cleanbuild: bun run clean && bun run build
scripts.test: bun run lint && bun run typechk && bun run justtest
